title: LlmClient routing through ModelRuntime for provider=local
goal: Update the existing LlmClient (CX-101; spec §4.2.3) to route every provider=local invocation through the new ModelRuntime trait (via the per-model RuntimeBinding from MT-067). This makes ModelRuntime the single mediator for local-model traffic per spec §4.6 invariant and AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT.
expected_diff_shape: Edit src/backend/handshake_core/src/llm_client/mod.rs (or wherever LlmClient lives) to add a LocalRouter that resolves ModelId -> Arc<dyn ModelRuntime>; new tests exercising local-vs-cloud routing branches.
unblock_conditions: MT-061..MT-069 merged (trait + registry + invariant + ledger integration ready).
implementation_notes: Per spec §4.2.3 (LlmClient CX-101) every model invocation must flow through LlmClient. Per spec §4.6 + AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT every local invocation must additionally route through ModelRuntime. LocalRouter: `struct LocalRouter { registry: Arc<ModelRegistry>, llama_runtime: Arc<dyn ModelRuntime>, candle_runtime: Arc<dyn ModelRuntime> }`; `fn resolve(&self, model_id: ModelId) -> Result<Arc<dyn ModelRuntime>, LlmClientError>` looks up the registration, branches on runtime_binding, returns the right runtime instance. LlmClient::generate becomes: parse provider from ModelRegistration.provider; if Local -> LocalRouter::resolve(id).generate(req); if ExternalCompat -> ExternalCompatLane (spec §3.6.4); if ByokCloud or OfficialCli -> existing cloud branches (cluster C.13 MTs add adapter implementations). Cancellation: LlmClient.cancel(token) calls runtime.cancel(token) so a single cancel surface works across local + cloud. Tests: generate routed to a fake LlamaCppRuntime; cancel cancels mid-stream; switch to a Candle-bound model and verify generate goes through CandleRuntime; ExternalCompat is NOT registered in ProcessOwnershipLedger (verifies MT-066 + MT-069 interaction). MUST NOT call llama_cpp_2::* or candle_core::* directly anywhere in llm_client (engine-agnostic invariant per AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT). FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-* events fire from inside LlmClient regardless of branch (observability parity).
risk_if_missed: Local invocations bypass ModelRuntime (spec §4.6 violation); engine-specific types leak into LlmClient callers; cancellation is per-runtime not unified.
validator_focus: Grep llm_client for engine-specific imports — zero; LocalRouter resolves both runtime kinds; cancel path covered by test; FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-* events parity verified.

minimum_controls: Grep test: llm_client/** contains zero llama_cpp_2:: or candle_core:: identifiers.
FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-* events emit identically for local + cloud branches.
